description: Wide nighttime photograph (no design overlay or on-image text) showing a row of about a dozen men photographed from behind, standing in a parking lot at dusk under a deep blue sky. Some wear plainclothes hoodies and jackets, interspersed with figures in multicam camouflage tactical gear; red and white vehicle and emergency lights glow at the far left and center. The tweet references the ICE HSI Trinitarios gang sweep.
